meta.title: the caves · echo
meta.for: Pirate Summer · caves level 1 / 2 / 3 · boathouse interior
meta.notes: 16 bars at 52 BPM · sparse.  A low ambient_drone in F minor, a slow single-note soft_sine bell every four bars that reads as dripping water in a stone chamber, a very quiet fluorescent_hum masquerading as the wall lantern's presence.  Nothing else.  The caves respect silence.
